body:
## Summary

Completed the requested `index.php` security audit from #2117 and created one GitHub issue per confirmed vulnerability. No code changes were required for the audit task itself.

## Created Issues

- #2119 Security: restrict wildcard CORS on authenticated API responses
- #2120 Security: enable TLS certificate verification for OAuth token and userinfo requests
- #2121 Security: do not expose fatal error messages, file paths, and line numbers to clients
- #2122 Security: replace predictable md5(microtime()) session token generation
- #2123 Security: validate OAuth state before redirecting to prevent open redirects
- #2124 Security: protect TRACE_IT diagnostic logging from unauthenticated activation

## Testing

- Not run: audit-only task with no code changes.

Fixes #2117
